situation: SZ-BG-M-007: Vision API fetch calls in vision-adapter.ts have no timeout — can hang indefinitely if remote server is unresponsive. 4 bare fetch() calls at lines 95, 146, 669, 692 (callAnthropicApi, callOpenAiApi, testConnection×2).
action: Added fetchWithTimeout() helper wrapping fetch with AbortController + 60s setTimeout. Replaced all 4 bare fetch calls. Committed directly in diverged opt-background-1783213292 worktree (cp-guard escape hatch per case-104 pattern).
outcome_evidence: Commit 4e7c23e on auto/opt-background-1783213292 pushed to origin. grep confirms zero bare 'await fetch(' outside fetchWithTimeout internals.
next_suggestion: Continue SZ-BG-M-008 (Non-PNG images skip all scaling/tiling/enhancement). Then SZ-SP-M-001 (Draw mode replaces all regions instead of appending).

audit_findings.finding: All Vision API fetch() calls lacked AbortController timeout — indefinite hang risk on unresponsive server
audit_findings.remediation: Added fetchWithTimeout() wrapper with 60s default; replaced all 4 call sites
